REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT GUNTHER GOPP'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT PLAINTIFF ROBERT TAYAC IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 6, 2017. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN MARCH 17, 2017 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ANDREW Y. S. CHENG, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-06-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT GUNTHER GOPP'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR TRESPASS (THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. SEE COMMON FACTS AND PARAGRAPH 1 OF FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION), NUISANCE (THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS DIFFERENT FROM NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION AS PLAINTIFF PRAYS FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. SEE PARAGRAPH 2 OF PRAYER. MOTION IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BATTERY. NON-OPPOSITION FILED. MOTION IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE PER SE FOR ALLEGATIONS TO BE INCORPORATED INTO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE AND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT SUPERVISION AS REQUESTED IN OPPOSITION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED (D501)

Motion To Amend The Complaint To Substitute Victor Grenados For Does 1 And Vic 1 Construction Company For Doe 2
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Tayac (415-556-000) Plaintiff/ Moving party in pro per.
Robert Maltz (510-457-3457) for Defendant/opposing party Gunther Gopp.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Hearing is held. Argued re: CCP 473 and 576, trial continuance, expert witness disclosure, delayed discovery and clarification re: amended complaint and amendment. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion To Amend The Complaint To Substitute Victor Grenados For Does 1 And Vic 1 Construction Company For Doe 2 is GRANTED. Amendment shall be filed forthwith. Doe defendants to be promptly served with Summons, Complaint and Amendment. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint Plaintiff Robert Tayac By Defendant Gunther Gopp
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GUNTHER GOPP's Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to strike request for attorney's fees is GRANTED. Motion is otherwise denied.

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings By Defendant Gunther Gopp On Complaint Plaintiff Robert Tayac
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GUNTHER GOPP's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is DENIED as to the cause of action for trespass (this cause of action is sufficiently alleged. See Common Facts and paragraph 1 of First Cause of Action), nuisance (this cause of action is different from negligence cause of action as Plaintiff prays for punitive damages. See paragraph 2 of prayer.
Motion is GRANTED without leave to amend as to cause of action for battery. Non-opposition filed. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend as to the cause of action for negligence per se for allegations to be incorporated into the cause of action for negligence and as to cause of action for negligent supervision as requested in opposition. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
